name: INFORAMTION
description: One-paragraph description of what this project does and who it serves.
conventions: All components use named exports, never default exports
API routes use Route Handlers in /app/api/**/*.ts
Zod schemas validate all external input
architecture_patterns: Server Components for data fetching, Client Components for interactivity only

file_structure.src/app: Next.js App Router pages and layouts
file_structure.src/features: Feature modules with co-located components, hooks, and types
file_structure.src/lib: Shared utilities, database client, auth helpers

patterns: Unit tests for all utility functions
Component tests for interactive UI elements

sprint_focus: Building the user onboarding flow with email verification and profile setup.
never_do: Never use useEffect for data fetching — use Server Components or SWR
Never store secrets in .env files committed to git
Never use inline styles — always use Tailwind classes
Never use `any` TypeScript type — always type explicitly
Never mix database queries into React components
preferred_patterns: Use Zod for all schema validation
Use Drizzle ORM for all database access
Use Next.js Image component for all images
